heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm, except a rising chance in New York. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. South winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, with a chance of thunderstorms. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s. South to southeast winds around 5 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered showers and thunderstorms; slight chance of a severe storm, mainly from Route 2 southward. Highs in the upper 70s to lower 80s south and the Champlain Valley, mid 70s elsewhere north. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
